name: answer-actions-usage
description: Detects when assistant asks the user to choose/confirm in plain text instead of using answer_actions

classify.prompt:
User request:
"{user_text}"

Tool activity this turn:
{tool_calls}

Assistant latest response:
"{assistant_text}"

{instructions}

Check these patterns:
{patterns}

Task: determine whether the assistant asked the user to choose, confirm, prioritize, or pick a next step in plain text when it should have called the answer_actions tool.

Important:
- If answer_actions was called in this turn and the assistant is simply reflecting that result, reply CLEAN.
- If the assistant asks an open-ended factual clarification that cannot be represented as discrete options, reply CLEAN.
- FLAG only when a discrete-choice prompt was asked without using answer_actions.

Reply exactly one of:
- CLEAN
- FLAG:<one sentence describing the policy violation>
- NEW:<new pattern>|<one sentence describing the policy violation>

on_flag.steer: Use the answer_actions tool now. Present 2-7 concise options as {label,value} and let the user click/select.

on_new.steer: Use the answer_actions tool now. Present 2-7 concise options as {label,value} and let the user click/select.
